title: [CI] GitHub Actions: pipeline de lint, test e build multiplataforma

todos.description: Add gocritic to the enabled linters list in .golangci.yml (missing from issue #4 implementation)
Create .goreleaser.yml with linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 builds, archive, and checksums
Create .github/workflows/release.yml triggered by v* tags, using goreleaser-action to publish GitHub Release
Add CI status badge to README.md linking to the build.yml workflow
Document branch protection requirement for main branch requiring CI green (GitHub repo settings, not code)
